title: Premium CEO Headshot Sample AI
sourceTitle: Premium CEO Headshot Sample AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: fictional adult founder in tailored dark suit and crisp white shirt, direct eye contact. Scene / Context: deep neutral studio background, sophisticated executive presence, realistic lighting. Source Recipe Translation: premium CEO headshot sample. Preserve these source mechanics: photorealistic premium CEO-style headshot, refined facial definition, dark tailored suit, confident leadership expression. Concrete social variant uses fictional adult founder in tailored dark suit and crisp white shirt, direct eye contact in deep neutral studio background, sophisticated executive presence, realistic lighting. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: photorealistic premium CEO-style headshot, refined facial definition, dark tailored suit, confident leadership expression; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: no visible text; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictionalized social-safe version of the source prompt; adult-safe styling; real brands, logos, teams, and public-figure likenesses replaced with fictional/generic equivalents; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.
